faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about working with Glowave

questions.q: How long does it take to build a website?
questions.a: Most business websites take around 2–4 weeks depending on complexity, revisions, and integrations.

questions.q: Do you provide SEO with website development?
questions.a: Yes. We include technical SEO, performance optimization, and search engine indexing setup.

questions.q: Can you redesign my existing website?
questions.a: Absolutely. We specialize in redesigning outdated websites into modern high-performance platforms.
Yes. We offer maintenance plans including updates, performance monitoring, and security checks.

questions.q: What industries do you work with?
questions.a: We work with startups, SaaS companies, agencies, and growing businesses globally.

questions.q: Do you build scalable SaaS platforms?
questions.a: Yes. Our team builds scalable SaaS platforms with modern technologies and performance optimization.
